overview: Advanced Wellness Solutions is a chiropractic and wellness clinic in Rockville, MD offering non-invasive, drug-free therapies including chiropractic adjustments, shockwave therapy, red light therapy, and ED treatment. Care is personalized to address root causes of pain and dysfunction.
highlights: Chiropractic care with spinal alignment and gentle adjustments
Shockwave and red light therapy for pain relief and healing
ED treatment using acoustic wave technology
targetAudience: Patients in Rockville and Montgomery County seeking non-invasive pain relief, mobility restoration, and performance optimization.
